Instant Lead Discovery

Get immediate access to new high-intent jobs as they hit the market. Our AI-driven engine filters opportunities so you can find the perfect match for your skills without the manual search.

One-Click Job Unlocking

Stop wasting time on complex bidding. Use your credits to instantly unlock full project details and direct customer contact info, moving you from "searching" to "quoting" in seconds.

Verified Customer Data

Every lead is vetted for quality and intent. We provide clear, honest project scopes on every job card so you only spend your credits on jobs that are worth your time and effort.

Frequently Asked Questions

Our support team is here to help. Send us an email and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

How does the credit system work?

Each job card displays a basic summary for free; if you find a project that fits your expertise, you spend a set number of credits to "unlock" it. This reveals the full project scope and the customer's direct contact information so you can reach out immediately.

What information do I get when I unlock a job?

Once a job is unlocked, you get everything you need to secure the contact. This includes the customer’s full name, phone number, and email address, as well as detailed project specifications

How are jobs verified before being posted?

We prioritize quality over quantity. Every lead on our dashboard undergoes an automated and manual vetting process to ensure the customer is high-intent and the project details are accurate. We filter out spam and incomplete requests so you only spend your credits on legitimate opportunities.

Can I post my own jobs on the platform?

While our primary focus is helping contractors and suppliers find work, you can certainly post projects if you need to subcontract a portion of a job or find a specific specialist. Simply head to the "Post a Job" section in your dashboard to list your requirements for our network.

Do credits expire?

No, credits do not expire. Monthly subscription credits typically reset with your billing cycle to encourage active lead-finding. However, any "Bonus Credits" or "Boost Pack" credits earned through first-time subscriptions or special promotions stay in your account as long as your subscription remains active.

How do I manage my subscription?

You have full control over your plan through your Account Settings. From there, you can upgrade your tier to access more monthly credits and seats, view your billing history, or update your payment methods via our secure Stripe integration.

How many credits does an unlock cost?

Unlock costs vary by opportunity type and value. You’ll always see the unlock cost before spending credits.

Are opportunities exclusive?

Opportunities may be visible to multiple users depending on plan and availability. TigerLeads is designed to help you act early—speed matters more than exclusivity. Each Lead is available to 5 Unique User Types per category. Once the 5 spaces are filled the Lead is no longer available for those Unique User Types.

Can my team use one account?

Yes—team plans support multiple seats so estimators, sales, and ops can work from the same pipeline.

What if I need help onboarding?

You can contact support or book a quick walkthrough—especially if you want help setting up trades, territory, and saved searches.
